title: Charter configuration
description: Schema for charter.yaml — the per-repo policy and MCP allowlist read by the Charter CLI (use-charter.dev). Add `# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://use-charter.dev/schema/charter.schema.json` at the top of the file for editor validation and autocomplete.

policy.description: Gate policy. Threshold precedence: --threshold flag > policy.threshold > policy.profile > default (80).

profile.description: Built-in policy profile setting the passing threshold: strict = 90, standard = 80, relaxed = 60.

threshold.description: Explicit passing score (0–100). Overrides policy.profile when set.

trustedRemotes.description: Allowlist of trusted remote MCP server origins (hostnames). Origins here satisfy AE-MCP-002 in addition to the built-in catalog.
